how_to_apply: Cast Certificate Instruction : OBC and EWS certificate should be issued after 01 April 2025.

Photo Instruction : The photograph should be full face, from front, with white background and without spectacles along with the name of the candidate and date of photograph should be written on the photograph.
Uttar Pradesh Common Nursing Entrance Test CNET 2025 Notification Released. Candidate Can Apply From 24/03/2025 to 03/05/2025.
